creator: doktor1@earthlink.net
text:
During installation from an MS-DOS partition of FreeBSD, downloaded
from the FTP server, and following instructions in the quick installation
guide to place bin files in c:\freebsd\bin, the installer program says,
"Cannot find file bin.aa"

-ALSO- the file BOOT.FLP exists in the /floppies directory, but ROOT.FLP
does not.

Fix: 

Install from CDROM? Perhaps, but that costs money :)
How-To-Repeat: Try to install FreeBSD as I have (described above).
